stemHtml: An aircraft is performing an approach with one engine inoperative. The outside air temperature at sea level is -10°C. The aircraft is unstable on final and the pilot decides to perform a go around. What is the effect on VMC?

options.a: Less rudder control effectiveness due to higher air density, so VMC increases.
options.b: High engine performance due to higher air density, therefore VMC increases.
options.c: High engine performance due to higher air density, therefore VMC decreases.
options.d: More rudder control effectiveness due to higher air density, so VMC decreases.
